## Process Agent Shortcuts (AI-TGE Generated)

The following shortcuts invoke AI-TGE governance agents. Type the shortcut anywhere in a chat prompt — the corresponding agent activates immediately. No further clarification needed.

**How it works:** The shortcut is a direct command. When the AI sees it in your prompt, it loads the corresponding agent from `.kiro/agents/` and executes its full check pass.

### Active Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Agent | When to Call | Tier |
|----------|-------|-------------|:----:|
| `TGV__` | `test-governance-agent` — Test Governance Validation | After Strategy phase, before Observation or team handoff | 1 |
| `CVR__` | `coverage-review-agent` — Coverage Review | During Observation phase, after coverage report generation | 1 |

### Shortcut Rules

1. **`TGV__` triggers Test Governance Validation.** When the user types `TGV__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/test-governance-agent.md` and execute its full check pass (20 checks across 5 categories). No clarification needed — treat `TGV__` as a direct command.

2. **`CVR__` triggers Coverage Review.** When the user types `CVR__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/coverage-review-agent.md` and execute its coverage trend analysis (15 checks across 4 categories). No clarification needed — treat `CVR__` as a direct command.

### When to Call

| Milestone | Which Agent | Why |
|-----------|-------------|-----|
| After Strategy phase (Stage 6) | `TGV__` | Validates strategy + register before observation begins |
| After major reconciliation | `TGV__` | Confirms register coherence after AP changes |
| After coverage report generation (Stage 9) | `CVR__` | Validates coverage calculations and trend analysis |
| Before sprint planning | `CVR__` | Confirms debt priorities are current for planning |
| Before release decision | Both | Full quality gate on test governance state |

### What Happens If You Don't Call Them

The test governance artifacts may contain:
- Strategy gaps (missing test types for critical commitments)
- Register inconsistencies (broken traceability, stale entries counted as coverage)
- Risk mis-scoring (wrong prioritization of missing tests)
- Coverage inaccuracies (false confidence in test completeness)

The compliance audit agent (AI-GCE) checks code compliance — it does NOT validate test governance quality. Only `TGV__` and `CVR__` perform that domain-specific validation.

### Quick Guide

For full documentation on the test governance checks, what happens if you skip, and how to recover, see:

> **`.governance/AGENT-GUIDE.md`** — the combined process agent user manual (AI-TGE section).
